creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
This is the first dependency for the full desktop environnement that will follow:

www/deforaos-Surfer
mail/deforaos-Mailer
print/deforaos-PDFViewer
deskutils/deforaos-Todo
multimedia/deforaos-Player
comms/deforaos-Phone
x11/deforaos-desktop
